description_long: This is a thick paperback book with a visually striking cover featuring bold, large black letters at the top and a colorful illustration below. The front cover artwork depicts a dramatic scene with a central figure in red, seated on a white throne-like structure, set against a surreal landscape with draped green fabric and a blue sky. The back cover features a stylized, high-contrast illustration of a standing character in yellow and red, with a block of descriptive text above. The spine is white and purple, with vertical and horizontal text, and includes a small illustration of two characters. The book's pages are visible from the side, showing a typical off-white paper color. The overall appearance suggests a graphic novel or manga, with a glossy printed cover and standard paper interior.
description: A thick paperback book with a bold, illustrated cover and spine, featuring dramatic artwork and vibrant colors. The book has a glossy cover and visible paper pages.
description_view_0: The front cover displays large black letters at the top and a vivid illustration of a figure in red on a white throne, set against a colorful, surreal background.
description_view_1: The side view shows the book's thickness and the off-white color of the paper pages, with the cover art wrapping slightly around the edge.
description_view_2: The back cover features a stylized yellow and red illustration of a standing character, along with a block of descriptive text and barcode at the bottom.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, showing white and purple coloring, vertical and horizontal text, and a small illustration of two characters near the top.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover is a vibrant, stylized scene featuring a central figure in red seated on a white throne-like structure, surrounded by draped green fabric and a surreal, colorful landscape with blue sky and rocky terrain. The art style is bold and graphic, with strong lines and dramatic color contrasts.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is primarily white and purple, with vertical black text and horizontal white text on a black background. There is also a small illustration of two characters near the top, adding a decorative element.
